[Notice – Data Patch on 7/23]

A Data patch to improve game performance and stability was applied on 7/23(Wed) 5:15 AM (UTC).
Please log in again to ensure the patch is properly applied.

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=3053563
